name: chartli
description: CLI for terminal charts from numeric data

scripts.example:svg: mkdir -p examples/assets/output && pnpm chartli examples/assets/core-multi-series.txt -t svg -m lines -w 320 -h 120 | sed -n '/^<?xml/,$p' > examples/assets/output/core-chart.svg && echo 'Wrote examples/assets/output/core-chart.svg'
scripts.example:kitchen-sink: pnpm run example:ascii && pnpm run example:spark && pnpm run example:bars && pnpm run example:columns && pnpm run example:heatmap && pnpm run example:unicode && pnpm run example:braille && pnpm run example:svg
scripts.example:image:svg: mkdir -p examples/assets/output && pnpm chartli examples/assets/image-data.txt -t svg -m lines -w 320 -h 120 | sed -n '/^<?xml/,$p' > examples/assets/output/image-chart.svg && echo 'Wrote examples/assets/output/image-chart.svg'
scripts.example:labeled:columns: pnpm chartli examples/assets/weekly-metrics.txt -t columns -h 8 --first-column-x --x-axis-label Metrics --y-axis-label Count --data-labels
scripts.example:labeled:svg: mkdir -p examples/assets/output && pnpm chartli examples/assets/weekly-signups.txt -t svg -m lines -w 320 -h 120 --first-column-x --data-labels | sed -n '/^<?xml/,$p' > examples/assets/output/weekly-signups-chart.svg && echo 'Wrote examples/assets/output/weekly-signups-chart.svg'
scripts.example:labeled:kitchen-sink: pnpm run example:labeled:ascii && pnpm run example:labeled:columns && pnpm run example:labeled:svg
scripts.example:image-set:kitchen-sink: pnpm run example:image:ascii-line && pnpm run example:image:sparklines && pnpm run example:image:horizontal-bars && pnpm run example:image:columns && pnpm run example:image:columns-alt && pnpm run example:image:heatmap && pnpm run example:image:unicode-bars && pnpm run example:image:braille && pnpm run example:image:svg
scripts.example:all-kitchen-sink: pnpm run example:kitchen-sink && pnpm run example:image-set:kitchen-sink && pnpm run example:labeled:kitchen-sink
